A '''clone of Darth Vader''' was created on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]], and was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by the [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|real Darth Vader]].

==Biography==
At some point before [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] visited ancient [[Jedi Enclave|Jedi ruins]] on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] which housed an active, yet unmanned, [[Cloning/Legends|cloning]] facility. He was ambushed by security [[Turret/Legends|turrets]] and his [[Squad/Legends|squad]] was all [[Death/Legends|killed]]. Vader was injured during this visit and some of his [[Blood/Legends|blood]] was left in the facility.<ref name="GOF" />

Believing that they were properly executing their programming, the experimental cloning [[Droid/Legends|droids]] running the facility created a clone of Vader using this sample. The droids then applied a mysterious technique (used with all of the facility's clones) in which they imprinted the clone with Vader's personality (from mental imprints left by the original host). However, as with the other clones from the facility, this process was faulty and left the clone with only partial mental functioning and personality synchronization.<ref name="GOF" />

Despite apparently not requiring [[Armor/Legends|armor]] similar to Vader's, the clone was dressed in a costume accurately reflecting the detail, but without the functionality of [[Darth Vader's armor/Legends|Darth Vader's armor]]. [[Tash Arranda/Legends|Tash Arranda]] deduced that it had been constructed from scrap lying around the abandoned [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Dantooine base/Legends|base]] on Dantooine. The clone Vader also had a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]. However, like the armor, it was merely an imitation, producing a fake blade that simply passed through objects without inflicting any damage.<ref name="GOF" />

Darth Vader returned to the facility in 0 ABY, soon after Tash Arranda, [[Zak Arranda/Legends|Zak Arranda]], and [[Mammon Hoole]] visited there. Vader slew his clone in battle and briefly contemplated its nature before departing the facility.<ref name="GOF" />
